nasb.text: As soon as he finished offering the burnt offering, behold, Samuel came; and Saul went out to meet him and to greet him.

esv.text: As soon as he had finished offering the burnt offering, behold, Samuel came. And Saul went out to meet him and greet him.

cnv.text: 他剛剛獻完了燔祭，撒母耳就來到了；掃羅出去迎接他，向他問安。

ccb.text: 扫罗刚把燔祭献完，撒母耳就来了，扫罗出去迎接他，向他问安。
